## Checklist

- [ ] The code compiles without warnings (`cargo build`)
- [ ] I've tested this manually on my platform
- [ ] If this changes the database schema, a migration has been added
- [ ] If this adds a new setting, it is persisted and loaded correctly
- [ ] If this touches the UI, it has been checked in both grid and list view where applicable
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or personal data are included in this PR
